category_sources: source_facts.description says proofreading tool for technical documentation; official homepage describes RedPen as checking documents/manuals against writing standards.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use RedPen; source_facts.name is redpen.
docs_sources: Official RedPen homepage links to View the RedPen manual at redpen.cc/docs/latest/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/redpen-cc/redpen; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official homepage says RedPen validates markup formats including Markdown, Textile, AsciiDoc, reStructuredText, and LaTeX; GitHub topics include linter and proofreading.
